    D

    dictionary - package dictionary
     
    DictionaryBuilder - Class in dictionary
    Implements a dictionary using a hash table with separate chaining.
    DictionaryBuilder(int) - Constructor for class dictionary.DictionaryBuilder
    Constructs a DictionaryBuilder object given an estimated amount of numbers.
    DictionaryBuilder(String) - Constructor for class dictionary.DictionaryBuilder
    Constructs a DictionaryBuilder object using a file.
    DictionaryBuilderGFATests - Class in tests
    Good Faith Attempt (GFA) tests for DictionaryBuilder.
    DictionaryBuilderGFATests() - Constructor for class tests.DictionaryBuilderGFATests
     
    DictionaryBuilderPublicTests - Class in tests
    Full functional test suite for DictionaryBuilder.
    DictionaryBuilderPublicTests() - Constructor for class tests.DictionaryBuilderPublicTests
     
    DictionaryCliIntegrationTests - Class in tests
     
    DictionaryCliIntegrationTests() - Constructor for class tests.DictionaryCliIntegrationTests
     
    DictionaryEntryNotFoundException - Exception Class in dictionary
    A custom unchecked exception thrown when a word is not found in dictionary during a search or removal.
    DictionaryEntryNotFoundException(String) - Constructor for exception class dictionary.DictionaryEntryNotFoundException
     
    DictionaryShell - Class in dictionary
    A command-line interface class built to interact with the DictionaryBuilder class.
    DictionaryShell() - Constructor for class dictionary.DictionaryShell
     
    driver - package driver
